## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs update
- [ ] Benchmark/testing only

## Validation

- [ ] python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
- [ ] Benchmark run (if algorithm changed)

## Benchmark Notes (if applicable)

Include key metrics before/after.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] No unrelated file edits
